nodes.name: Recording Webhook
nodes.notes: POST your call recording data here. Required fields: recording_url, rep_email, deal_id, call_duration_mins. Optional: rep_slack_id, contact_name.

nodes.name: Submit to AssemblyAI
nodes.notes: Set ASSEMBLYAI_API_KEY as an n8n environment variable. speaker_labels=true gives you per-speaker sentiment and talk ratio.

nodes.name: Wait 3 Minutes
nodes.notes: Typical transcription takes 1-3 minutes for a 30-60 min call. Increase for longer calls or add polling logic.

nodes.name: Fetch Transcript
nodes.notes: Polls AssemblyAI for the completed transcript. For production, add an IF node to check status='completed' and loop back if still processing.

values.content:
You are an expert sales coach analysing a recorded sales call transcript. Provide a detailed, actionable analysis.

Return ONLY a valid JSON object with this exact structure:
{
  "overall_sentiment": "positive|neutral|negative",
  "rep_sentiment": "positive|neutral|negative",
  "prospect_sentiment": "positive|neutral|negative",
  "prospect_engagement_level": "high|medium|low",
  "rep_talk_ratio_pct": <number 0-100>,
  "call_quality_score": <number 1-10>,
  "buying_signals": [<array of strings>],
  "objections_raised": [<array of strings>],
  "pain_points_mentioned": [<array of strings>],
  "next_steps_agreed": [<array of strings>],
  "rep_strengths": [<array of strings>],
  "coaching_points": [<array of strings>],
  "executive_summary": "<2-3 sentence summary>",
  "recommended_action": "<specific next action for the rep>"
}

nodes.name: AI Call Analysis
nodes.notes: Uses GPT-4o with JSON mode enabled. The system prompt enforces structured output for reliable parsing.

nodes.name: Log to HubSpot
nodes.notes: Logs the full analysis as a call note on the HubSpot deal. Ensure deal_id from the webhook matches a valid HubSpot deal ID.

nodes.name: Post to Slack
nodes.notes: Route to #coaching-queue instead of #call-reviews for calls scoring below 6.

parameters.responseBody: ={ "status": "processing", "message": "Call analysis started. Results will be logged to HubSpot." }

nodes.name: Webhook Response
nodes.notes: Returns immediately so the calling system doesn't time out waiting.

parameters.content:
## 16 — Sales Call Sentiment Analyzer

**What this workflow does:**
Receives a call recording URL → transcribes with AssemblyAI → deep AI analysis via GPT-4o → logs structured intelligence to HubSpot → posts summary to Slack.

**Before you use this:**
1. Set ASSEMBLYAI_API_KEY as an n8n env variable
2. Update all credential IDs
3. Update deal_id field mapping to match your HubSpot setup
4. Adjust Slack channel names

**Test by sending this payload to the webhook URL:**
```json
{
  "recording_url": "https://example.com/call.mp3",
  "rep_email": "rep@company.com",
  "deal_id": "12345",
  "call_duration_mins": 30
}
```
